mapper.select: SELECT i.intersection_id, i.name, CAST(i.latitude AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS latitude, CAST(i.longitude AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS longitude, COALESCE(i.status, 'NORMAL') AS status, COALESCE(i.green_time, 40) AS green_time, COALESCE(i.yellow_time, 5) AS yellow_time, COALESCE(i.red_time, 35) AS red_time FROM intersection i ORDER BY i.intersection_id

SELECT i.intersection_id, i.name, CAST(i.latitude AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS latitude, CAST(i.longitude AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS longitude, COALESCE(i.status, 'NORMAL') AS status, COALESCE(i.green_time, 40) AS green_time, COALESCE(i.yellow_time, 5) AS yellow_time, COALESCE(i.red_time, 35) AS red_time FROM intersection i WHERE i.intersection_id = #{id}

SELECT TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at), 'HH24:MI') AS hour, COUNT(*) AS vehicle_count, ROUND(AVG(speed)::numeric, 1) AS avg_speed, CASE WHEN AVG(speed) >= 40 THEN 'SMOOTH' WHEN AVG(speed) >= 25 THEN 'SLOW' ELSE 'CONGESTED' END AS congestion_level FROM traffic_flow_log WHERE collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at) ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', collected_at) LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_intersections, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE COALESCE(i.status, 'NORMAL') = 'NORMAL') AS normal_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE COALESCE(i.status, 'NORMAL') = 'CAUTION') AS caution_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE COALESCE(i.status, 'NORMAL') = 'EMERGENCY') AS emergency_count, ROUND(AVG( COALESCE(i.green_time, 40) + COALESCE(i.yellow_time, 5) + COALESCE(i.red_time, 35) )) AS avg_cycle_time FROM intersection i
